Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and low blood glucose, which may indicate risk of hypoglycemia. LDL cholesterol is high, increasing cardiovascular risk, while HDL is also elevated, which is generally protective. Globulin is low, possibly reflecting immune or protein synthesis issues. Other parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation are recommended.
